studyName: Strong Activation of Retroviral LTRs in HCC

tables.description: Sample ID, body site where sample was obtained, analyte type, tumor status, histological type, primary or metastatic tumor, and sequencing center of participants with or without hepatocellular carcinoma and involved in the "CAGE Profiling of ncRNAs in Hepatocellular Carcinoma Reveals a Strong Activation of Retroviral LTR Promoters in Virus-Induced Tumors" project.

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Body site where sample was collected

variables.name: HISTOLOGICAL_TYPE
variables.description: Cell or tissue type or subtype of sample

variables.name: PRIMARY_METASTATIC_TUMOR
variables.description: Primary tumor, metastasis, or transformed cell line

variables.name: SEQUENCING_CENTER
variables.description: Name of the center which conducted sequencing

tables.description: Subject ID, consent group, and affection status of participants with or without hepatocellular carcinoma and involved in the "CAGE Profiling of ncRNAs in Hepatocellular Carcinoma Reveals a Strong Activation of Retroviral LTR Promoters in Virus-Induced Tumors" project.

variables.name: AFFECTION_STATUS
variables.description: Case control status of the subject

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Consent group as determined by DAC

tables.description: Subject ID, sample ID, and sample use variable obtained from participants with or without hepatocellular carcinoma and involved in the "CAGE Profiling of ncRNAs in Hepatocellular Carcinoma Reveals a Strong Activation of Retroviral LTR Promoters in Virus-Induced Tumors" project.
